query_title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You

recommendations.title: You're Killing Me Susana
recommendations.overview: An actor's world comes crashing down after he learns that his wife has left him.

recommendations.title: Dirty Girl
recommendations.overview: Accompanied by her closeted gay buddy, a promiscuous teenager sets out to find her long-absent father.

recommendations.title: We Made a Beautiful Bouquet
recommendations.overview: Two people meet each other after missing the last train home, leading to a beautiful relationship over five years.

recommendations.title: Kabir Singh
recommendations.overview: Kabir, a genius yet hostile medical student, falls in love with Preeti from his college. When Preeti's father spots the couple kissing, he opposes their relationship and decides to marry her off.

recommendations.title: Distracted
recommendations.overview: A comedy about an absent-minded man who works at a advertising company and topples from one problem to another.

recommendations.title: Isolation
recommendations.overview: On a remote Irish farm, five people become unwilling participants in an experiment that goes nightmarishly wrong.

recommendations.title: Nancy
recommendations.overview: Nancy becomes increasingly convinced she was kidnapped as a child. When she meets a couple whose daughter went missing thirty years ago, reasonable doubts give way to willful belief.

recommendations.title: The Benefactor
recommendations.overview: A newly married couple are forced to navigate the all-consuming interest of a powerful, mysterious, and possessive philanthropist.

recommendations.title: Cheaper by the Dozen
recommendations.overview: This remake of the beloved classic follows the raucous exploits of a blended family of 12, the Bakers, as they navigate a hectic home life while simultaneously managing their family business.

recommendations.title: The One I Love
recommendations.overview: Ethan and Sophie are a married couple on the brink of separation when, at the urging of their therapist, they decide to salvage their relationship by escaping to a beautiful vacation house for the weekend.
